transcript.clean_text: for many riders the region of Alicante is known as a first-class training round at the beginning of each season but the pleasant climate that is sought after in January turns into crushing heat in August 31 degrees Celsius at the race start today and before the day of tomorrow the stage seems made for the punchers again 130 kilometers on even ground before climbing the outer lip wiggler enter twice but before it comes to the major difficulty ten men break away on the first kilometres amongst em mark Solaire marquel IRA's R and G go Rubio admit race the escapees have a lead of three minutes but teen Cannondale leads the pack and remains vigilant then Team Sky take things in hand the breakaways are doomed mark Sol Aaron Toby a Sloot vixen attack and the escape route falls apart in the first meters of the eye to the peak Lorenza but even this effort won't be enough for the escapees and even the last ones are taken right before the final ascent the road is open for the final showdown of the first week of the Vuelta 2017 Roman bar day and three Chikara pass are the first to attack on the ascent the Team Sky doesn't let him put away Davi dela Cruz also tries his luck but he will be countered by the British tube thank you stuff of Rome takes off 500 meters from the finish line and no one will be able to keep up with him two years ago the stage to Cumbre del Sol revealed a certain Tom du Moulin this year on the same roads Chris Froome puts his rivals a little bit further behind winning a grand tour without taking a stage can be done as Chris Froome has shown on the latest to the France but taking stages is a lot more satisfying on his quest for the doodle the British has proven his dominance at Cumbre del Sol after great support by his teammates from Sky on the preak laurenza from stubble acceleration on the final 500 meters left his opponents without a chance it's the 40 second career win for Froome and he increases his lead in the overall ranking of the welter 2017 I was still in my mind this morning we watched watch the scenes from two years ago over and over on the bus this morning just to really calculate the climb and know when when the right moment to to push was and yeah again the legs felt great today so just feels feels good to to be in this position it had almost been a year since Chris Froome had managed to take a stage on a Grand Tour it was on the Vuelta 2016 today's stage 9 finally rewards the British for his efforts esteban chavez and michael woods also confirmed a great shape today with an additional 10 second bonus Chris Froome increases his lead in the overall ranking except for Esteban Chavez all his rivals live more than a minute behind the British after nine intense days the pec will be able to get some rest tomorrow and after the day off in the region of Alicante it will go to a llama demuccio the Calado Bermejo a first category climb located 20 kilometers from the finish line promises another exciting stage you
